Dev: Universal health check configuration — Replace hardcoded '/health' endpoint checks with configurable HEALTH_CHECK_PATH and HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT variables. Add skip-health-check flag for projects without health endpoints. Default: HEALTH_CHECK_PATH='/health', HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT=5. Transform 4 hardcoded curl -sf --max-time N "http://localhost:${port}/health" calls to use ${HEALTH_CHECK_PATH} and ${HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT}.

Dev: Safe pipe wrappers for grep/find/awk — Add safe_pipe() helper function that appends '|| true' to any command and captures exit code. Create wrappers: safe_grep(), safe_find(), safe_awk() that auto-handle pipefail. Then transform the 32 unsafe raw pipes (identified in analysis) to use these wrappers. Pattern: change 'grep -n "pattern" file | head -10' to 'safe_grep -n "pattern" file | head -10 || true'. Add comment '# safe_pipe: no fail on empty results' for clarity.
